---
# title: "Code"
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

## Various Codes developed in research

- [**Rossby wave activity**](files/LWA/readme.md) — diagnosing the large-scale wavy patterns and eddy mixing of quasi-conservative quantities in the atmosphere (used for potential vorticity, Z500, column water vapor, etc.)

- [**Space-time co-spectra of wave perturbations**](files/co-spectra/readme.md) — diagnosing the eddy characteristics of Rossby waves such as eddy momentum fluxes and heat fluxes

- [**Idealized Spectral Atmospheric Models**](https://github.com/gchenpu/idealized) — Various modified versions of GFDL Idealized Spectral Atmospheric Models (detailed documentation to be added)

:::

:::
